properties.remark: THE TORNADO THAT DID EXTENSIVE DAMAGE IN WILKES COUNTY CROSSED OVER INTO EXTREME NORTHERN MCDUFFIE COUNTY AND DISSIPATED. ONLY TREES WERE TAKEN DOWN IN MCDUFFIE COUNTY JUST SOUTH OF THE LAKESHORE.
